arts.ttl: Aggie Beever-Jones: Lionesses' hat-trick hero eyes Euros ticket after Portugal rout
arts.sum: The Chelsea starlet all but confirmed her place in the Euros squad

arts.ttl: Beever-Jones hits rapid hat-trick as England pummel Portugal 6-0 in Nations League
arts.sum: It doesn’t matter how you get your chance to shine, what matters is you take it, and on Friday night at a balmy Wembley Stadium Chelsea forward Aggie Beever-Jones did just that in a 6-0 defeat of Portugal. “Destroy them” was the message from manager Sarina Wiegman before kick-off, said Beever-Jones, and she obliged.
